description: Numeric-payload canonicalization for v0.3 payload_sha256 (§9.2). A response.value / state carrying numbers MUST canonicalize to byte-identical RFC 8785 JCS across implementations, so the digest agrees. Pins the canonical JCS + digest for a representative numeric set (integer, negative, fraction, 1e-7, 1e+21, max-safe int 2^53-1, nested array/object). RFC 8785 §3.2.2.3 number formatting == ECMAScript Number::toString; a non-JS signer MUST use a vetted JCS library to match.
obligation: canonicalize({response, state}) MUST equal `payload_canonical_jcs` byte-for-byte; the lowercase-hex SHA-256 of those bytes MUST equal `payload_sha256`. All numeric values are within IEEE-754 double range (±2^53-1); an integer beyond that MUST be carried as a string, not a number.
